ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Order To Appear (For Administrator Joana Tieu)
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-01-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Faye Lee, for and with Joana Tieu, Administrator.

At the outset, counsel reports as to the Order to Show Cause and Order to Appear to Administrator. After consideration of the preceding, the court determines that is shall not order sanctions at this time. The court points counsel to the pending issues with this matter. Counsel reports that there have been filings made to address the issues as described by the court. The court notes that it does not appear that there have been any filings as reported by counsel and advises counsel to contact the Probate Examiner for clarification. A mutually agreeable date for a continuance to clear the above issues is discussed and confirmed.

The Order to Show Cause and Order to Appear are taken off calendar. The remaining matter is continued to Apr-15-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Loke. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Continued To Apr-01-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court imposed sanctions of $250 against attorney Peter Bresler for failing to appear on January 21, 2025. An additional $250 sanction was imposed for failing to appear on February 4, 2025.

The court shall issue another Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause to Mr. Bresler to appear on April 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to explain why further sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed for his failure to appear.

An Order to Appear shall also be issued to administrator Joana Tieu, to appear on April 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

The court continued the matter to April 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2025 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The court shall issue an Order to Appear to Mr. Bresler for March 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. An Order to Show Cause shall also be set for the same date, to explain why sanctions in the amount of $250 should not be imposed for counsel's failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause set for today's hearing is also continued to March 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances.

The court noted that the court clerk attempted to reach Mr. Peter Bresler to remind him of today's hearing, but he was unreachable.

The court shall issue to Peter Bresler an Order to Appear/Order to Show Cause to appear on February 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to explain why he should not be sanctioned $250 under CCP Section 128 for failing to appear at today's hearing. The hearing on the First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, Petition for Allowance of Compensation, and for Final Distribution is also continued to that date.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-30-2024 Continued To Jan-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter H. Bresler for Joana Tieu, Administrator (via Zoom).

Mr. Bresler reported that a final distribution filing was prepared and sent for review but returned with two corrections required. Due to time constraints, the corrected version was not ready for submission to the court in time for today's hearing.

The court noted that the case had previously shifted calendars and determined that it should be returned to Judge Murphy's Tuesday calendar for future proceedings. After discussion as to scheduling, the court continued the matter to January 21, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow sufficient time for corrections and proper notice.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-27-2024 Continued To Dec-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Peter Bresler for Joana Tieu, Petitioner (via Zoom)

Discussions were held as to deficiencies in the petition which need to be addressed. The court noted that the petition is not verified, an "as of date" for the assets on hand was not provided, details of securities need to be clarified, and clarification is needed regarding the tax situation of the estate.

The court continued the petition to December 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow the petitioner time to address the deficiencies.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-30-2024 Continued To Nov-27-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Continued To Oct-30-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Joana Tieu (petitioner/administrator).

The court questioned why the probate examiner's notes from three months ago have not been addressed. Mr. Bresler stated that the administrator had difficulty identifying the nature and amount of the assets in the retirement account and that it has been sent to the probate referee. The court pointed out that there are a number of items in the notes that could have already been resolved. The First and Final Report of Administrator on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to October 30, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bresler is to address all of the outstanding issues and complete all filings by October 16, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Continued To Jan-09-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom):

Peter Bresler, Esq., for Joana Tieu, Personal Representative.

At the outset, the court acknowledges the recently filed partial Inventory and Appraisal. The court points counsel to the previous calling of this matter where the bench officer indicated that the court would consider sanctions if both an Inventory and Appraisal and a Petition were not filed by today's hearing.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Jan-09-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. An Order to Show Cause, pursuant to CCP 177.5, as to why the Administrator should not be suspended, shall be issued for the same date.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-31-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Peter Bresler, Esq., via Zoom, for Joana Tieu, Personal Representative.

At the court's query, Mr. Bresler offers a report of the status of the Estate. The court acknowledges counsel's report and reminds him that there has been no progress in this matter for over a year and that it needs to be resolved soon. The court advises counsel that both an inventory and appraisal and either a report on status of administration or a petition for final distribution must be filed by the next hearing date or the court will consider sanctions.

The subject matter is continued to Dec-05-2023 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Nguyen. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Continued To Oct-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Joan Tieu (administrator).

Mr. Bresler request a 30-day continuance for a report on status. Status on close of estate is continued to October 31, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. File status by October 24, 2023.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
